home.title: Agricultural Equipment Rental Platform
home.subtitle: Rent agricultural equipment easily. Connect farmers with equipment owners.
home.payDesc: Advance payment by scanning QR code

auth.name: Full Name
auth.farmerDesc: Find & book equipment for your farm.
auth.loginSubtitle: Login using your mobile number for easy access.
auth.otpHint: We'll send a 6-digit code to verify your number.
auth.devOtpHint: Dev mode: check backend terminal for the OTP.
auth.registerSubtitle: Tell us a bit about yourself to get started.
auth.otpSubtitle: Enter the 6-digit OTP sent to your mobile number.

footer.aboutDesc1: FarmSaarthi is a location-based agricultural rental platform built to make modern farming equipment accessible to every farmer. We connect equipment owners with farmers who need machinery for a day, a week, or a season.
footer.aboutDesc2: Our mission is simple: reduce the cost of farming, increase equipment utilisation, and help the farming community grow together.
footer.service1Desc: Find tractors, harvesters, sprayers and more within your radius.
footer.service2Desc: Book equipment for exact time slots that fit your schedule.
footer.service3Desc: Pay an advance by scanning QR code or through UPI to lock your booking.
footer.service4Desc: Let your unused equipment generate income by renting it out to trusted users.
footer.faq1A: Sign up as a farmer, browse equipment near your location, select a slot, and pay a 10% advance to confirm your booking.
footer.faq2A: Anyone registered as a renter (equipment owner) can list their machinery. All listings go through admin verification before going live.
footer.faq3A: Yes. We use secure payment methods like QR code and UPI for all transactions. Only a 2% advance is charged at booking; the rest is settled directly.
footer.faq4Q: What if the equipment breaks down?
footer.faq4A: Contact the equipment owner immediately. Raise a dispute through the app and our support team will assist within 24 hours.
footer.faq5A: Yes, cancellations are allowed up to 12 hours before the scheduled slot. Service charges are not refunded.
footer.faq6Q: Which areas do you currently serve?
footer.faq6A: We currently operate in and around Mysore, Karnataka. More districts are being added soon.

checkout.title: Secure Checkout
checkout.serviceChargeDesc: Non-refundable platform service charge collected online to confirm your booking.
checkout.balanceDesc: Pay this amount directly to the owner once the job is completed.
checkout.distanceField: Distance from equipment to your farm (km)
checkout.cancellationNote: The 2% service charge is non-refundable in case of cancellation.
checkout.termsNote: By continuing, you agree to FarmSaarthi's terms and cancellation policy.

equipmentPage.noEquipmentHint: Try increasing the distance filter or adjusting your search.
equipmentPage.fullyBooked: Fully booked today — pick another date

farmer.searchCta: Need equipment for your next job?

farmer.disputeStep2: • Our support team will review your case within 24 hours
farmer.disputeStep3: • Booking is paused and marked "Under Review" until resolved

farmer.issue_no_show: Equipment / Operator Did Not Show Up

payment.title: Complete Payment
payment.subtitle: Scan the QR code with any UPI app to pay the 2% non-refundable service charge and confirm your booking.
payment.payNowDesc: Non-refundable. Pay via UPI to confirm booking.
payment.payAfterDesc: Pay directly to the owner after work is done.
payment.scanHint: Use PhonePe, GPay, Paytm, or any UPI app
payment.note2: Remaining amount to be paid directly to the owner after service.
payment.note3: Contact the owner before the scheduled time.
payment.confirmNote: Your booking will be confirmed once you press the button above.

renter.noRequests: No new booking requests at the moment.
renter.unitsHint: Farmers will see how many are available to book today

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Update your profile details and manage your account.
settings.coordsNote: Coordinates are used for nearby equipment discovery. If you want to change them, update your location from the registration flow or ask to add a map picker.
settings.dangerDesc: Deactivating your account will log you out and prevent future logins.
